race.comment: BROOKLYN DAN (5) has been freshened since coming from a tough back row draw to place in the Nutrien Final at Wagga six weeks ago. Won three in a row prior including his victory over star colt Hollywood Strip in the G2 Gold Chalice at Bathurst. Big chance. The marble has fallen perfectly for his stablemate CARDIGAN DAN (1). He drew wide and worked when fourth in the Nutrien final last start and had recorded a string of wins and placings prior. Led throughout from this barrier three back at Bendigo so could be hard to catch. REWATCH (8) backs up after a brave third in last Saturday's South East Derby, beaten just a neck. Draws for a trail so could be dangerous. DYNAMITEDAN (13) cops a tough draw but is worth including after winning both starts at Melton since a spell. MAJOR BLITZ (2) faces a class test but has put a string of wins together in Victoria and draws well.
